    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    WaitingListDAO.updateExitReason(int confirmationCode, ExitReason exitReason)
    Updates or clears the exit reason for a specific entry.
    void
    WaitingListDAO.updateExitReasonByConfirmationCode(int confirmationCode, ExitReason reason)
    Updates the exit reason for an entry that is currently active.
